name: Sega Mega Drive
description: Sega's 16-bit home console platform, known as the Sega Genesis in North America. Defined by fast arcade-style action, strong third-party support, and Sonic the Hedgehog.

eras.title: Launch and Arcade Identity Era
eras.description: Early period focused on arcade-style action, Sega conversions, and establishing the Mega Drive against 8-bit systems.

eras.title: Sonic Boom Era
eras.description: Sonic, aggressive marketing, sports games, and strong third-party support define the system's global identity.

eras.title: Late 16-bit Mastery Era
eras.description: Late-generation technical showcase period with polished action games, RPGs, licensed titles, and regional deep cuts.
